name: Texas Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons bottled liquid hot red pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
Garnish: diced avocado, grated cheddar cheese, chopped cilantro.
1. Heat butter and oil in a large kettle.
2. Saute chopped onion, jalapeno, garlic, carrots, celery, and chicken until onion is translucent and all vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in cumin, chili powder, salt, pepper, bottled hot red pepper sauce, and flour. Mix well.
4. Add diced tomatoes and chicken broth. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
5. To serve, place a few tortilla chips at the bottom of each soup bowl (6 to 8).
6. Ladle soup into bowls and top with desired garnishes: diced avocado, grated cheddar cheese, and chopped cilantro.
